taxonomy: Zootrophion endresianum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae, and its full classification is Orchidaceae, Epidendroideae, Maxillarieae, Zootrophion. It belongs to the genus Zootrophion, a small group of orchids. The genus is closely related to the genus Maxillaria. Zootrophion endresianum is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchids.
